summary: Iteration 48: Representative Phase 2 Features Testing. All 30 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified Contract, Docs, and Saques tabs in Rep Dashboard. All Phase 2 features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Contract acceptance correctly stores full_name_signed, ip_address, user_agent, contract_text, and accepted_at
Document upload validates doc_type against allowed values (rg, cnpj_card, contrato_social, selfie, outro)
Document limit of 10 per rep is correctly enforced
Withdrawal system correctly deducts balance immediately on request (hold pattern)
Withdrawal rejection correctly returns balance to rep
Admin document review correctly updates status to approved/rejected with review_note
Admin withdrawal management correctly processes approve/reject actions
Rep authentication uses X-Rep-Token header consistently across all Phase 2 endpoints
seed_data_creation: Test documents created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Representative features fully tested. Features verified: (1) POST /api/rep/accept-contract - Contract acceptance with IP/timestamp capture, (2) GET /api/rep/contract - Contract status and text retrieval, (3) POST /api/rep/upload-document - Document upload with base64 and doc_type validation, (4) GET /api/rep/documents - List documents without base64 data, (5) DELETE /api/rep/documents/{doc_id} - Delete pending documents, (6) POST /api/rep/withdrawals - Request withdrawal with balance check and PIX key, (7) GET /api/rep/withdrawals - Withdrawal history, (8) GET /api/admin/rep-documents/{rep_id} - Admin views rep documents with base64, (9) PUT /api/admin/rep-documents/{doc_id}/review - Admin approves/rejects documents, (10) GET /api/admin/rep-contracts/{rep_id} - Admin views signed contract, (11) GET /api/admin/rep-withdrawals - Admin lists all withdrawals with filter, (12) PUT /api/admin/rep-withdrawals/{wd_id} - Admin approves/rejects withdrawals. Frontend: Rep dashboard at /representative/dashboard?token=xxx shows all 7 tabs (Resumo, Contrato, Docs, Clientes, Estab., Comissoes, Saques). Contract tab shows signed contract with signature info. Docs tab shows upload interface with doc type selection and document list with status badges. Saques tab shows balance, withdrawal form with PIX type selection, and history.

frontend_tabs.Contrato: Shows signed contract with full text, signature name, IP, and date - WORKING
frontend_tabs.Docs: Shows upload interface with doc type buttons, upload button, and document list with status badges - WORKING
frontend_tabs.Saques: Shows balance, withdrawal form with PIX type selection, and history - WORKING

validations.doc_type_validation: Only allows rg, cnpj_card, contrato_social, selfie, outro - WORKING
validations.document_limit: Max 10 documents per rep enforced - WORKING
validations.pending_withdrawal_check: Prevents new withdrawal while one is pending - WORKING
validations.pix_key_required: Requires PIX key for withdrawal - WORKING
